cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the article to see what Pieter did and how he felt when he fought with the crocodile. From the text, we know that Pieter was bitten by a crocodile while swimming with his horse. He realized it was a crocodile after initially thinking it was a hippo. He started to fight immediately, using his left arm to hit the crocodile. When it pulled him under, he made the decision to stand up again to avoid being submerged, which would have been fatal. He then used his right arm to grab the horse's rope and made his way to safety. The article also mentions that he didn't lose too much blood and he was aware of the risks of a crocodile bite being septic. These details suggest that Pieter remained calm and made quick, logical
